title: Move & Chat
description: Press control to move, still keeping the chat window open!
body:
Move & Chat lets you use a keybind - defaults to left control - to bring the chat window out of focus and let you move around. If you are writing a command it will suggest things like coordinates or mob uuids based on what you are looking at.

**Keybinds:**
- Ctrl to toggle command movement in chat
- Enter while in command movement to accept the current suggestion send the command
- Tab while in command movement to accept the current suggestion and go back to normal mode
- Alt-tab while in command movement to accept current suggestion, add a space to go to next argument but stay in command movement mode

Showcase
-
